pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for the local Christmas attraction with key information and entry points to tickets, schedule, accessibility, and planning tools.
primary_functions: Introduce the attraction, dates, hours, and key highlights.
Provide primary calls-to-action to buy tickets, view schedule, and plan a visit.
Surface promotional banner or block linking to the Holiday Newsletter signup.
Provide global navigation access to Tickets & Pricing, Schedule, My Night, Groups, Getting Here, Accessibility, and Contact.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary CTA button labeled 'Buy Tickets' or main navigation 'Tickets & Pricing'.
Click primary CTA button labeled 'View Schedule' or 'See Tonight’s Activities'.
Click primary CTA button labeled 'Plan My Night'.
Click newsletter promo banner or link labeled 'Holiday Newsletter' or 'Stay Updated'.
Click homepage content link such as 'Getting Here & Parking'.
Click homepage link or badge labeled 'Accessibility Information'.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link/logo in the main site header.
Users can land directly on the homepage via the main site URL.

pages.name: Tickets & Pricing
pages.description: Central hub for all ticket types and timed sessions, including Family Night, Sensory-Friendly sessions, and general admission options.
primary_functions: Display list of main ticket types (e.g., General Admission, VIP Holiday Package) with links to detailed ticket pages.
Show a calendar and list of timed sessions with filters for date range, time of day, event type (Family Night, Sensory-Friendly), and audience.
Provide sorting options such as total price for a family of four or price per person.
Allow users to select a session card to view detailed session information and begin the booking process.

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD' to pre-select the calendar start date for sessions.
Optional ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD' to pre-select the calendar end date for sessions.
Optional event type filter (e.g., 'family_night', 'sensory_friendly') to pre-filter sessions.
Optional audience filter (e.g., 'families', 'all_ages').
Optional start time filter in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.
Optional end time filter in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a timed session card (e.g., Family Night or Sensory-Friendly session) in the sessions list.
Click a ticket type card, such as 'General Admission' or 'VIP Holiday Package'.
Click 'View Cart' link or icon in the tickets context.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Tickets & Pricing' in the site header.
Footer link 'Tickets & Pricing'.
Linked from homepage CTAs and from About/FAQ content sections.

pages.name: Session Details
pages.description: Detail page for an individual dated and timed session (e.g., a specific Family Night or Sensory-Friendly time slot).
primary_functions: Display session information including date, start/end time, event type, and any special notes (e.g., sensory-friendly, family night).
Show ticket pricing breakdown by category (Adult, Child, Senior, etc.) and calculate totals based on selected quantities.
Allow users to set ticket quantities for each category and see updated total price in real time.
Provide an 'Add to Cart' button to place the configured session tickets into the shopping cart, with optional add-ons that can be left unselected.

incoming_params.description: ID of the Session to display and configure for booking.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' or cart icon after successfully adding session tickets to cart.
Click 'Back to Tickets' link to return to the sessions list around this session's date.

access_methods.description: Accessed when a session card is clicked on the Tickets & Pricing page with a 'sessionId' query parameter.

pages.name: Ticket Type Details
pages.description: Detail page for non-date-specific ticket products like General Admission or VIP Holiday Package.
primary_functions: Present 'Whats Included' details, including any perks such as free drinks or priority access.
Show clear adult and child pricing for the ticket type.
Allow users to compare value by reviewing perks and prices for different ticket types.
Enable users to set ticket quantities (e.g., 2 adults) and add the ticket type to the shopping cart.

incoming_params.description: ID of the TicketType to display (e.g., General Admission, VIP Holiday Package).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after successfully adding ticket-type products to the cart.
Click 'Back to Tickets & Pricing' to compare with other ticket types.

access_methods.description: Accessed when a ticket type is selected on the Tickets & Pricing page using the 'ticketTypeId' parameter.

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Shared cart where all selected tickets and packages are collected before checkout.
primary_functions: List all items currently in the cart with session or ticket-type details, quantities, and prices.
Allow users to update quantities or remove items from the cart.
Display subtotal and total costs with any taxes or fees clearly indicated.
Provide a path to proceed to checkout or continue browsing tickets and activities.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue Browsing Tickets' from the cart.
Click 'Back to Home' from an empty-cart state prompt.

access_methods.description: Accessible at all times via the 'Cart' link/icon in the header.
Linked after adding items from Session Details or Ticket Type Details pages.

pages.name: Schedule & Activities
pages.description: Interactive schedule of activities, shows, and workshops offered at the attraction.
primary_functions: Display a date picker to select a specific visit date (e.g., December 18).
Offer filters for audience (Families, Adults, etc.), time range (e.g., 4:00 pm8:00 pm), category (e.g., Light Shows, Workshops & Crafts), and location (indoors/outdoors).
Show a list or grid of matching activities with key details such as title, start time, duration, and location.
Allow users to click an activity card to see full details or quickly add an activity to 'My Night' from the listing.

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD' to pre-select the visit date in the schedule.
Optional audience filter for activities (e.g., 'families').
Optional time range start in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.
Optional time range end in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.
Optional activity category filter (e.g., 'light_show', 'workshop_craft').
Optional location filter such as 'indoor' or 'outdoor'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an activity card to view full details.
Click 'View My Night' after adding activities for the chosen date.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Schedule & Activities'.
Footer link 'Schedule & Activities'.
Linked from homepage CTAs and About/FAQ sections.

pages.name: Activity Details
pages.description: Detail page for an individual scheduled activity, show, or workshop.
primary_functions: Display full description, date, start/end time, location, and category of the activity.
Show suitability information such as audience (families, kids, adults) and accessibility notes.
Provide an 'Add to My Night' or 'Add to Itinerary' button to include the activity in the users itinerary.
Offer navigation back to the schedule list (e.g., 'Back to Schedule').

incoming_params.description: ID of the Activity to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View My Night' after adding the activity to the itinerary.
Click 'Back to Schedule' to return to activities for the same date.

access_methods.description: Accessed when an activity is selected from the Schedule & Activities list or from My Night, using the 'activityId' parameter.

pages.name: My Night / Itinerary
pages.description: Users personalized itinerary view summarizing selected activities for a chosen date.
primary_functions: List all activities the user has added to their night in chronological order with times and locations.
Allow users to remove individual activities from the itinerary.
Highlight any time conflicts or gaps in the schedule where applicable.
Provide options to print, download, or save the itinerary for reference during the visit.

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD' selecting which day's itinerary to show; if omitted, the most recently used date is used.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add More Activities' from the itinerary view.
Click an activity title within the itinerary to view its details.

access_methods.description: Global header link labeled 'My Night'.
Linked from Schedule & Activities and Activity Details after adding items.

pages.name: Accessibility
pages.description: Comprehensive accessibility information, including entrances, viewing areas, and direct contact with the accessibility team.
primary_functions: Present an overview of accessibility services (wheelchair access, sensory-friendly offerings, parking, restrooms).
Show an 'Entrances' section with a map and list of accessible entrances, allowing users to select a specific entrance such as 'North Gate  Accessible' to view details.
List accessible viewing areas with clickable items that open detail panels or sections.

Provide an embedded contact form dedicated to accessibility inquiries, including a Subject dropdown with an 'Accessibility & Mobility' option and fields for name, email, and message, plus a 'Contact Accessibility Team' button that scrolls to or reveals the form.

incoming_params.description: Optional Entrance.id used to pre-select and open details for a specific accessible entrance (e.g., 'North Gate  Accessible').
Optional AccessibleViewingArea.id used to pre-open details for a specific accessible viewing area.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a secondary link such as 'Need more help? Contact us' beneath the accessibility overview.

access_methods.description: Main navigation link 'Accessibility' in the site header.
Footer link 'Accessibility'.
Linked from homepage badges and FAQ answers that reference accessibility.

pages.name: Groups & Parties
pages.description: Information and booking entry point for group visits, corporate outings, and parties.
primary_functions: Explain group visit benefits, minimum group sizes, and discount options.
Provide a group booking interface where users can enter group size (e.g., 15 guests), choose a date, and filter times (e.g., sessions after 8:00 pm).
Allow users to click 'Show Group Times' to view a list of eligible group sessions with price per person and any 'Group Discount' badges.
Enable users to select a specific group session card to open the Group Session Booking page.

incoming_params.description: Optional initial group size to pre-fill the group booking form.
Optional ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD' to pre-select the date for group search.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a group session card after running 'Show Group Times'.
Click 'Contact Our Group Specialist' link for custom group inquiries.

access_methods.description: Main navigation item 'Groups & Parties'.
Footer link 'Groups & Parties'.

pages.name: Group Session Booking
pages.description: Booking form for a specific group session with discount and flexible payment options.
primary_functions: Display selected group session details such as date, start time, group discount, and price per person.
Allow users to confirm or adjust group size if needed and see updated pricing.
Offer payment method choices including 'Pay on Arrival' or 'Invoice Later' where available.
Collect group contact information (Contact Name, Phone Number, Email) and provide a 'Continue to Finalize Booking' or 'Review & Confirm' button without requiring online payment.

incoming_params.description: ID of the GroupSessionOption selected from the Groups & Parties page.
Initial group size to calculate and display pricing for this group session.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Group Times' from the booking form.

access_methods.description: Accessed when a group time is selected from the Groups & Parties search results using 'groupSessionOptionId' and 'groupSize' query parameters.
Group booking form submission uses the createGroupBooking interface without navigating away for payment.

pages.name: Holiday Newsletter Signup
pages.description: Dedicated page for visitors to subscribe to the holiday newsletter and set their content preferences.
primary_functions: Present an interests checklist including 'Family Activities' and 'Special Offers & Discounts', allowing users to select only their desired categories.
Offer a Frequency selector (e.g., weekly, monthly) with the ability to choose 'Weekly' updates.
Collect subscriber details such as Email, First Name, and ZIP/Postal Code.
Submit newsletter preferences via a 'Sign Up' or 'Subscribe' button and confirm subscription success.

incoming_params.description: Optional source tag indicating where the user came from (e.g., 'home_banner', 'footer_link').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to Home' after a successful subscription confirmation.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Holiday Newsletter'.
Accessed via homepage promo modules and other marketing links.
Newsletter signup form submission uses the createNewsletterSubscription interface.

pages.name: Getting Here & Parking
pages.description: Practical travel information, including driving directions, public transit options, and parking details.
primary_functions: Provide tabs or sections for Driving, Public Transit, Parking, and other transport modes.
Under Public Transit, allow filtering by transport mode (e.g., Bus, Train) and show only bus routes when 'Bus' is selected.
Display a list or map of bus routes with walking time from stop to attraction and service hours, and enable clicking a route name to open a details panel.
Offer links to the Contact Us page for follow-up questions about transportation and parking.

incoming_params.description: Optional tab to pre-select on load, such as 'driving', 'public_transit', or 'parking'.
Optional transit mode filter for the Public Transit section (e.g., 'bus').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Ask about this route' or 'More transportation questions?' within a transit route details panel.

access_methods.description: Header navigation item labeled 'Getting Here'.
Footer link 'Getting Here & Parking'.
Linked from FAQ answers and homepage planning sections.

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: General contact page for visitor inquiries about transportation, tickets, accessibility, and other topics.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form with a Topic or Subject dropdown including options such as 'Transportation & Parking' and other key categories.
Collect visitor details including Name, Email, and Message content describing their question or request.
Allow visitors to submit their inquiry via a 'Send' or 'Submit' button.
Confirm that the message has been successfully sent and provide expected response times.

incoming_params.description: Optional contact topic enum to pre-select in the Subject dropdown (e.g., 'transportation_parking', 'group_bookings').
Optional free-text context (e.g., specific bus route or entrance) to pre-fill in the message field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' after a message is successfully sent.

access_methods.description: Header navigation link labeled 'Contact Us'.
Footer link 'Contact Us'.
Contact form submission uses the submitContactMessage interface.

pages.name: About the Attraction
pages.description: Background information about the Christmas attraction, its mission, and event overview.
primary_functions: Describe the history, mission, and unique features of the attraction.
Summarize event dates, typical daily schedule, and any charitable partnerships.
Highlight key experiences such as Santa visits, light shows, and workshops to orient new visitors.
Link to related planning pages such as Tickets & Pricing, Schedule & Activities, and Accessibility.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Tickets & Pricing' from the About page.
Click 'See Daily Activities' from the About page.
Click 'Accessibility Information' from the About page.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'About'.
Linked from homepage and external references explaining the attraction.

pages.name: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.description: Central FAQ for common visitor questions related to tickets, activities, accessibility, and logistics.
primary_functions: Organize frequently asked questions into sections such as Tickets, Activities, Accessibility, Groups, and Getting Here.
Provide concise answers that help reduce the need for direct contact.
Link users from answers to relevant detailed pages (e.g., Tickets & Pricing, Accessibility, Groups & Parties).
Allow searching or filtering FAQs by keyword or category to quickly find relevant answers.

incoming_params.description: Optional FAQ section to focus on when the page loads (e.g., 'tickets', 'getting_here').
Optional search query used to pre-filter FAQ items.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Learn more about tickets' link inside a Tickets FAQ answer.
Click a 'See directions & parking' link in a Getting Here FAQ answer.
Click 'Accessibility details' from an Accessibility FAQ answer.
Click 'Group bookings information' from a Groups FAQ answer.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'FAQ'.
Linked from other pages whenever more detailed FAQs are needed.

header_links.description: Homepage with highlights and main entry points.
Browse ticket types and timed sessions, and start ticket purchases.
View the daily schedule of activities, light shows, and workshops.
View and manage your personalized evening itinerary.
Plan and book discounted group visits and parties.
Directions, public transit options, and parking information.
Information on accessible entrances, viewing areas, and services.
General contact form for questions and support.
Review and manage tickets and packages added to your cart.

footer_links.description: Learn more about the Christmas attraction and its mission.
Frequently asked questions about tickets, accessibility, and more.
Overview of ticket options, pricing, and special sessions.
Browse activities, shows, and workshops by date and category.
Information and booking for group visits and events.
Directions, transit routes, and parking details.
Accessibility services, entrances, and contact with the accessibility team.
Sign up for holiday updates, family activities, and special offers.
Contact form for general inquiries and transportation questions.
